title: Snap Inc. Q1 2026 Financial Results Summary
text:
Snap Inc. Q1 2026 Financial Results Summary

Key Financial Metrics

Revenue & Profitability:
Revenue reached $1.529 billion, a 12% year-over-year increase from $1.363 billion
Net loss of $89 million, improved from $140 million loss in Q1 2025
Adjusted EBITDA doubled to $233 million versus $108 million previously

Cash Flow Performance:
Operating cash flow: $327 million (116% increase YoY)
Free Cash Flow: $286 million (150% increase YoY)
These strong improvements reflect operational efficiency gains

User Growth & Engagement

Active User Metrics:
Global Monthly Active Users: 956 million (5% YoY growth)
Global Daily Active Users: 483 million (5% YoY growth)
AR Lenses used over 9 billion times daily on average

Creator Momentum:
Spotlight posters grew 74% in the US and 61% globally
Over 400,000 Lenses submitted quarterly (150% YoY increase)
Snap Map reached 450 million global monthly active users

Revenue Diversification Initiatives

Advertising Innovations:
AI Sponsored Snaps enable brands to leverage interactive conversations through their Chat feature, broadening personalized advertising approaches.

New Formats Performance:
Sponsored Snaps click-through rates increased 226%
Dynamic Product Ads revenue grew 30% YoY
Other Revenue surged 87% to $285 million

Specs & Hardware Strategy
The company expanded collaboration with Qualcomm to integrate Snapdragon processors into future Specs generations, positioning eyewear as a core long-term growth platform.
